title: security-issue-import params
description: Adopter-tunable parameters for the security-issue-import skill. The reconciler merges intent.overrides.params['security-issue-import'] onto params.defaults.yaml.

security-list-mailbox.description: Gmail label or query that identifies the security-list inbox. Example: 'label:security-list'.

tracker-repo.description: GitHub repo where tracking issues are created. 'owner/repo' form.

default-window-days.description: Number of days back to scan when no explicit window is given. Default 14.

wide-sweep-days.description: Days back used for 'import all'. Default 90.

needs-triage-status.description: Status field value applied to newly imported trackers on the project board. Example: 'Needs triage'.

confirmation-reply-locale.description: BCP 47 language tag for the draft confirmation reply (en, pt-BR, etc.). Reporter-facing.
